Dohare Associate Professor Employee ID: 9261 Qualification: M.E. : 0731-2582165 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Er. Devendra Dohare is working as Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) in the Department of Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics having teaching experience of 15 years. He is in-charge of Board Room/ Seminar Hall of Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics Department and has successfully carried out various responsibilities in Examination, Academics and on Department level. His area of research includes Sewage Treatment, Solid Waste Management, Industrial Wastewater Management, Water Treatment, Air Pollution and Control Technologies. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Year University/Institute Division Specialization 1 B.E. 2001 JEC, Jabalpur - Civil Engineering 2 M.E. 2004 JEC, Jabalpur - Environmental Engineering 3 Ph.D. (pursuing) - RGPV, Bhopal - Civil Engineering M.Tech. Dissertation Title: PhD Dissertation Title: Work Experience: S.No. Employer Designation Department Duration of Employment-In Months Date of Joining Mode of Employment 1 SGSITS, Indore Assistant Professor Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics Research Details: Area of Research Interests Water and Wastewater Treatment Technologies Air Pollution Monitoring and Control Technologies Solid Waste Management Hydraulic Analysis of Water Distribution Network and Sewer Network Industrial Waste Treatment and Pollution Abatement.
